name: Cheese Dreams
author: Poki
description:
Cheese Dreams is a fun platform game where you play as a bouncy cheese wheel. Beware of enemies ! Let nothing stop you in your quest of gathering stars and clearing the levels ! Cheese Dreams is developed by Nitrome. Every level has different challenges. The game has remained to be popular to this day! Enjoy your cheesy adventures here on Poki! {"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"FAQPage","mainEntity":[ {"@type":"Question","name":"How to play Cheese Dreams?", "acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":" Collect the stars on your way and bounce around to reach the end of the levels.
